g.text: I hereby voluntarily provide my personal information and authorise Martins Direct, its insurers, administrators, underwriters, service
providers and authorised partners to collect, process, verify, store, update and share my personal information for policy
administration, underwriting, claims administration, compliance, fraud prevention and customer service purposes in accordance
YES –I consent to receiving product updates and marketing communications.
NO –I do not consent to receiving marketing communications.
I confirm that the information provided is true and correct and understand how my personal information will be used.
